reviews.review_description: I'm having a great time with this game. I like the overall vibe and the music is nice too I suppose the only thing I wish was better is the melee combat. sometimes it doesn't want to work right and they kinda get stuck on the robots and count like ten hits or glide over them without registering a hit, I think if I have a plasma sword it would burn through and count one hit without hindering my movements and there was no way I could really fight the final boss with melee weapons (throwing knife didn't work on it) oh and also I wish I could apply more chips at one time I feel like I can't get the full potential out of the upgrades I'd say with that it'd be perfect

reviews.review_title: From one Rouglike fan to another...
reviews.review_description: Excellent core mechanics. The game is challenging and fun. I am a huge Proton fan, and rouglikes in general, this one surprised me I'm luvin it
This game has quite literally infinite replay value, would reccomend.

I love this game because it has an amazing feel of progression, but I would love to see another tower being made with new maps and such. I know how big of an ask I’m making but I would also love to see multiplayer. In my opinion it would work like the ancient dungeon multiplayer ( being able to give half your life to another player to revive them) I also think new classes like revolver that starts you out with a revolver but healing and upgrades are hard to find. I know this is a lot to ask but the last thing I would love to see added is an endless mode. Thank you so much.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, we really appreciate it, you have a lot of great ideas there.

Please stay tuned to the new game we will announce this year, it will definitely scratch that multiplayer itch.

reviews.review_description: This is easily a five star campaign game with insane replay-ability. I couldn’t stay in it for less than 5 minutes when I first got the quest and didn’t understand the importance of a vr mat and the effects of motion sickness, but now that I have my vr legs, this game is one of my favs and come Christmas it will be one of my younger siblings favs to. Just add more weapons and expand on the world.
(I’ve never played ultra kill.)

I played this game a year or more ago in the demo and liked it. I just played the finished game and now I LOVE it.  Those whining about getting dizzy from "walking" and those bit@hing about game play and upgrades just have NO IDEA what they are doing.  This game is addictive, fun and challenging.  I can't wait to see if they add more runs.
I would like to see like a new map / area and sone new weapons

reviews.review_title: Has appeal but triggers motion sickness
reviews.review_description: I don't often get motion sickness but unfortunately the movement in this game aggravated it. The game itself is nice. Shooter with robots, add in some upgrades, a ton of weapons and I can see the appeal. But if you're at all susceptible to motion sickness, this game isn't for you.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. Sorry to hear that you experienced motion sickness. Did you try some of the comfort options in the settings? Did you play with stick locomotion or teleport? We're dedicated to creating a comfortable experience that all players can enjoy, so any additional feedback you can share on your experience is very welcome (here, Discord or email: contact AT salmi DOT de).

reviews.review_description:
I enjoy the game so far but there are a few things I would really like to see:

•Click the movement stick to sprint 
•A dash/dodge (with cool down?)
•Permanent "Roguelite" character upgrades 
•Detailed weapon/item stats on the info card
•Log-in rewards
•Inventory slots for unequipped Chips
•Teleport to cleared rooms
•Movement speed overhaul 
•Weekly challenges 
•Increase the grab distance 
•More elemental damage types


Thank you!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, we appreciate the suggestions and hope to incorporate them in future update.

Regarding "dash/dodge", this isn't exactly what you're looking for, but some players like to play with stick movement on one controller and teleport on the other.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game with great replayability. I have a question about level 5-1 in Lunatic mode. After the credits hallway there is a room with a floating sphere. I see that there is a red door next to the door you enter from, but it’s locked. If you kill the sphere everything explodes, ending the game. Not sure how to progress, as I’ve tried many things across 3 successful runs, to no avail.

developer_response.body: Hi etherviz, congrats on beating the game on the hardest mode. You're experiencing the intended ending. Sorry for the confusion with the red door, it currently doesn't do anything or lead anywhere. We may add more ending variations in the future but for now that's it.

reviews.review_title: Glitch for meta quest 3 (or in general)
reviews.review_description: Best rogue like vr game ever!, but I'm guessing the lense isn't properly fitted for the quest 3, when I enter the game I see a little thing in the middle that gives me motion sickness (granted which I never get), it interprets the middle of my vr glasses even though it only happens in this game, not in any others so this is definitely something that needs to be fixed, as it also obstructs my view and really messed with my gameplay experience (I need to play this game, fix now!!!!)

This game has blown me away. So stylish and such fun. I keep finding more things to get excited about, such as the grapple gun. The upgrades are awesome as is the sword. It's just brilliant, thank you!

Awesome! Thank you :)  
I look forward to anything you create in the future!  
<3

PRAISE:
I LOVE the “cel-shaded” art style. 
The randomness is very well-executed. 
Replay value is top-notch!
The Map system is great!
Everything works really well, it’s a pleasure to play. 
I love how easy it is to switch weapons & manage inventory (once you get the muscle memory down). It’s neat that I can easily switch the weapons in my hands by tossing them up & catching them with the opposite hand. Nice touch!
The Musical UX is awesome. It amps me up for battle & lets me know when to relax. Immersive!
I didn’t know what “unstuck” was until I had to use it - very helpful feature. Kudos. I’ve only had to use it once. 

GRIPES:
My only complaint would be with the arm chips. I wish there was better UX. Colors & icons could be used better to identify uses (ie the text is green but the chips are orange). Also, I should be able to just grab a chip & move it to a different slot. The [<<] is helpful, but I still have to do math to sort it out - & even though a chip is LISTED as the TOP spot, it’s actually BOTTOM on my arm. 
Speaking of UX, show me what things are when I’m holding & looking at them. I have to drop things & look at them to remind me what they are. The overlays already exist - repurpose them. 
It’s also a bit difficult to look down & view my inventory, but you get used to it. 

CONCLUSION:
Great game! Please expand!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for all the feedback, we really appreciate it. We're continuing to improve our chip UX, you can expect some improvements there in the next update. You can also look at the weapon info while holding them if you turn them a bit sideways towards you. The current system is not ideal, but we will continue to improve it.

Thanks again for your feedback, it really helps us improve the game.

reviews.review_description: Most of what I play on the Meta Quest is roguelikes. This one is certainly an addictive one.. For my first time playing, I got killed a few times, but it is pretty cool wandering around the ship you're on. The enemies also look pretty cool. As is typical for any shooting game, some go down more easily than others, but honestly I definitely enjoy it so far. I can see me playing this one a lot more. I'd recommend it
It never gets old. Good balance of fun and challenge.

The game itself is addictive to a new extreme with the Reaper class. I feel like it's going to keep getting better with all of these new weapons.
  I will like to suggest that this game broadens the melee weapons department. Like Hammers, scythes, knuckles, axes. Each with a secondary function when you pull the trigger.
   Reason why I say that is due to me being a fanatic of swords, knives and melee weapons.

   An addition would probably be an archer class using a standard bow and arrow with the grapple gun or the throwing knife as a secondary in class choices. I just think adding a bit of a twist to using ranged weapons in a gun based game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and the suggestions. We're always exploring ideas for new weapons and we'd like to do a pass improving our melee weapons in a future update.

reviews.review_description: Your piece of s**t game reset itself to beginner default, AGAIN. Don't try to blame this on Meta like you did last time, I checked, and their servers had nothing to do with it. This game is garbage, do not buy this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi again, we're sorry to hear you're still experiencing this issue. We understand how frustrating it must be to lose progress.

Our team has spent a lot of time investigating, but without more details through email or Discord, we haven’t been able to identify the root cause. In the meantime, we are working on a way to restore progress based on unlocked achievements.

We’re still happy to help if you're open to reaching out directly. Your feedback is noted, but resolving this fully requires collaboration.

reviews.review_title: Sweet Surrender is a very well made game
reviews.review_description: I have thoroughly enjoyed my time with Sweet Surrender, even though I am not a fan of rogue-like games myself. The setting and art style really interested me as well as the designs of the enemies. I would highly recommend this to anyone who is a fan of sci-fi media and / or rogue-likes.

The game is really fun but I wish there was more of a warning when deleting your progress because I tried to do the daily run, and it deleted my main game progress. Awesome game with amazing graphics I just wish there was more of a warning for losing progress. Great work on the game though, keep it up!

I tried this game just last week and I'm really addicted to it. So far I haven't encountered any bugs or glitches. I noticed one gameplay thing tho. The holding position of the one handed weapons felt a little off centred compared to other shooting games I've played. But over time I got used to it. And please add more big bosses. Overall a great experience.👍🏻

So far ok but early days.

Love the graphic style ,  dry , crisp and textureless sci-fi vibe with nod  to Tron and Borderlands ( a bit ) and stuff like that.

Corridor and corner turning based sneaking about , punctured with rapid fire-fights with solid variety of droids and robot sentries. So far combat is manageable as long as you grab a gun and remember how it re-loads. Arm down - arm up. Simple!
Have blown myself up too many times with grenades . DO NOT PRESS THE BUTTON and NOT THROW. Yep , muppet , I did that.

Good available cover via crates etc. But no crouch that I can find , yet.
Also you can push crates and boxes around with your hand providing some limited cover opportunities and also using them to fall on enemies. Scenery / props can be shot at too.

And it’s rogue-like , which is no longer that original in VR , but if it’s your gaming vibe and style then this delivers. I felt bit jaded for a while as it feels you are  punished for , so far , little gain ? Not 100% clear on how I am actually progressing and have to clearly learn how the game operates with respect to chip upgrades etc.

Similar to how I must have had to learn how to progress in Death Unchained and eventually ride with the flow and grind onwards.

Guess each valiant attempt builds up your rewards etc and unlocks better stuff ?

Hope to heaven I don’t just keep ending up in the same starting spot and with no weapons ? Hope not !  Maybe that’s the whole point ?

So in summary ,

Cool graphic vibe creating a convincing world, clearly lots of exploring and sneaking about in ever changing rooms allied to the principle of Repeat-Die-Repeat .

Collecting gears and upgrades still a mystery and no doubt I need to be patient here.

I still can’t believe that I can actually be “in” the sort of computer games I played flat-screen so long ago. 

So lock and load and here we go again.

Enjoy!
Truly phenomenal
Very fun game

reviews.review_title: Easy to pick up, hard to master
reviews.review_description:
Both myself and my younger son enjoy this game. 

He enjoys just being in a virtual world shooting laser guns and beating up on the lower level bots. Every time I feel like I’ve got a build that’s going to take me all the way I find a new challenge I want prepared for. 

Definitely glad I picked this up as one of my first VR titles.

developer_response.body: We're glad you and your son are enjoying the game, thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_title: Lack of variety on some parts
reviews.review_description: The game is amazing, amazing art style and the abillity to make you smile at all times, the shooting is fun and ducking while giggling like a six year old will never not make me happy, the self destruction spiders always make me jump, and the chips have plenty of synergy but there aren't a ton of game changing builds or anything that really impacts your gameplay and the enemies are all more or less the same, if the game got some variety and better leveling it'd be a 10/10

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, we're glad you're enjoying it. We're planning to make further improvements to our upgrades this year to add more interesting chips. Hopefully that will lead to more game changing builds!

reviews.review_title: Great shooter for a quick pickup & play
reviews.review_description:
Fast and fun game.
Play the daily challenge, it's great.
This is my go to game when I want to just play something and not go through a ton of loading screens.

This a fun and cool looking game with guns robots and melee weapons it’s so much fun it’s also cool to fight the robots because you can use there body parts as weapons and some explode when defeated there are a good verity of weapons also you have a pretty good health bar it is just easy to get hit. 🙂👍🔫🗡️

This game is a blast to play. It's both challenging and enjoyable. Sure, at the upper ends it's a bit repetitive, but after going through over a dozen times there is still new stuff to discover and new strategies to employ. I'm not sure if anyone has beat the game on a purely melee build but that would be difficult. It was great maxing out the 3 starting builds and hitting those challenges. 
Only thing that would be better would be the ability to pause and see status of challenges. The leech challenges were most annoying, had to play through 4 or 5 times to just even get enough grenades to make it happen, but was still fun to get done! 
Hot tip: some levels have multiple end zones, hit each one for additional free items or alternate grenades and respec chips, then leave to go to the other and zone for double. 😀
Good game nice graphics

reviews.review_title: The game is fun but stuttery
reviews.review_description: I really like this game but it stutters on my quest 3 which kinda ruins the experience, tries different graphics presets and that made no difference :(

developer_response.body: Hey sorry to hear you are having stuttering issues. Does it still happen after you restart the headset (sometimes a restart helps). In Update 14 (coming out at the end of April), we're adding a fully custom Graphics profile for Quest 3, hopefully you can tune it to something that feels more comfortable for you.

reviews.review_description: I mistook this for Swarm when I first got it with meta +. It's arguably better than swarm. This is probably the best rougelike I've played since vampire survivors. The enemy types and weapons are great and the levels are well made.

Just went on to continue where i was in the game and all my progress is completely gone, dont know how or why but this is quite upsetting. This game was really fun but im not replaying in hopes this wont happen again.

developer_response.body:
2nd EDIT:
Hi we're sorry to hear that, it's the first time (edit: now second) we've heard of a player losing their progress. To be clear, until this week-end (April 5--6), we had not previously received reports about users losing progress in 3.5 years since release. This shouldn't happen. We suspect it's related to some event with Meta's Cloud Saves, and we're reaching out to Meta to investigate.

In the meantime: could you please go to this page and see if you can access (and restore) an older backup: https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/

If you reach out to us over Discord (or email), we can do our best to further track down this issue.

reviews.review_description: Really good game but it freezes so many times, I have to restart my device to be able to close the app and losing progress,,,

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback. Sorry to hear you're having issues with freezes. We are releasing an update this month that will hopefully address the problems you are encountering.

If you're interested, we already have a beta preview of the next update that you can try out that may already fix your problems. Please join our Discord for more details. (discord.gg/salmigames)

reviews.review_description: Addictive - thanks devs

developer_response.body: Thanks for your continued support!

reviews.review_description: I’ve never been big on Rogue-like games and I feel like it is over done in VR. However,I have enjoyed this more than I expected. I like the simple yet stylish graphics and the gun mechanics are quite good as well. Even if you’re like me and not a big fan of this genre,you still might really enjoy it. I highly recommend it,luckily it is available on Quest+ which gave me an opportunity to try out a game that would’ve normally flew under my radar. I also recommend subscribing to Quest+,it is hard to beat for $8 a month. You get 2 games each month that you will get to keep,as long as you’re subscribed. It also gives you an ever growing list of games that stay up for several months at a time. I have bought over 60 games since July and still see it well worth the $8 a month

Thanks for the info about accuracy.
Solid 4.



Why? Because you still can't aim correctly with the hand guns iron sights. There is random bullet spread no matter what you do. I reported this like a lifetime ago.I can even play the controller on a flat surface to have like no movement at all, and bullets will still spread to the point of it beibg meaningless to use iron sights

Since headshot damage does more damage it would be nice if iron sights worked like they do in virtually any other vr shooter on the market.
Same issue way back on my quest 2. Sorry, but it's the game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your updated review and your feedback, we appreciate it.

Original Reply (for context):
The starter pistol has some amount of bullet spread. We have both accuracy upgrade chips and a number of improved hand guns with higher accuracy (revolver, focus pistol (with slow-down) and the tier 2 laser-sighted pistol is a huge step up from the starter pistol.

A core part of a run is upgrading your weapons and your chips. If our starter pistol had pinpoint accuracy, there would be no point in any of the upgrades. Even with that in mind, you can still pull off headshots with the basic pistol, just not across the length of a larger room.

reviews.review_description:
This is definitely one of the best rogue-likes in VR. 
It's fast-paced, gorgeous to look at and simple enough for people new to VR.

The guns have a nice variety and feel really good to handle, but the absolute highlight is the chip-based upgrade system, which is just so well done, with lots of fun combinations to experiment with.

Highly recommended!
Really looking forward to whatever these devs are working on next.

Gameplay and mechanics are pretty good, weapon diversity is a plus, but the environments are incredibly unimaginative, drab and repetitive...

Hoping that changes a bit as I play more.

Also, why do some guns just completely disappear after I put them down?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, sorry to hear the weapons are some times disappearing. Could you please send us your logs next time it happens (Settings->Report Bug), it will help us investigate this issue further.

Also if you have a video of this issue, please share with us, it helps us track down these issues. You can reach us directly in our Discord (discord.gg/salmigames) or by email.

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun it's replayed and fun you should try it out!
I really like the art style and the gameplay is super fun.￼
Too much walking g which makes you very dizzy.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you are having issues with the movement in the game. Please note we support both joystick and teleport movement. We also provide various comfort setting options to suit all players. Perhaps these can help relieve the discomfort you are experiencing.

reviews.review_description:
Manages to top compound thanks to deeper gameplay and that is no mean feat.
Cell shading graphics really suit the quest and the gameplay is tight, the weapon have a good feel. 
With two hip holsters a slot over your shoulder you can hold up to five weapons at the same time along with slots for grenades/stims, which opens a lot of options and variety.
As to what I want... more. More environments, more enemies and more weapons in the future, whether as an update, a dlc or a sequel. 
One of my top five games.

This game can be fun...right up to the point that some bug ends your run. It's usually on the elevator. I just had a run end when I had the gall to actually turn around while the next round was loading. Didn't even move. Just turned around. The game is too dumb to recenter you on the elevator platform at the start of a round. Like every other game out there so you end up outside the map or falling down the elevator shaft to your death. How hard is it to set a characters position in a game engine. NOT VERY!
 Seriously, I have had SOOOOOOO MANY rounds end on that elevator. It's really frustrating and makes it very hard to even want to play this title or take the leader boards seriously. 
It is a rogue like so one life. So to have it constantly snuffed out by bugs is inexcusable. The devs should worry less about adding content and fix what is already there. 
If they want more stars, fix the bugs!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We just recently released a hotfix that adresses this issue. This bug shouldn't occur anymore.

We're sorry to hear that you are experiencing this issue so often which results in ending your run. This is an issue that came up only recently, but we are working on it and try to fix it.

reviews.review_title: One of the most boring Quest 2 Games
reviews.review_description: There is no style or gimmick to this game, it feels like a bad PC rogue like that they just slapped into VR and called it a day. The levels and music make me tired to be in, the gun sounds and enemies are beyond uninspired and boring. Better luck next time
Disappointing graphics and very dull gameplay

developer_response.body: Hey 4apaef, we are sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy the game, though we are thankful that you gave it a chance. If you decide to revisit it in the future, we’d love to hear more about why you didn’t like it. I’m sure we can find stuff to expand/improve upon.

reviews.review_description: The only really upgradable part of your character are these chips that you put in your arms. They barely do anything and they only affect the arm that they're on. So basically they're worthless. The core mechanic of this game is worthless.

Its great! It earn a spot on my games that i make sure to play everyday,  looking forward to the progression update and seeing what classes are gonna be all about.  Good job guys keep up the great work!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review. We are also really excited for the moment when we can share more about our progression update and classes with you.

reviews.review_description:
I played this game for 20 minutes and quit the fourth time I got stuck in a wall and couldn't figure a way out. This was in addition to the time just one of my hands got stuck in a piece of background clutter and I couldn't move until I lined my actual hand back up with the phantom game hand and moved it sideways through a crate.

The developers should never have charged money for something this bad. If/when they patch it to a point where you can consistently play a game of it, I'll update my review, but I can't warn you off the game strongly enough in its current state.

To be honest, even beyond the myriad glitches and game-breaking bugs, it also seemed like a pretty lame game. It's a rogue-like, so I'd normally withhold judgment until I'd unlocked more stuff, but it really does seem to be little more than "walk through rooms, shoot robots." If if brings anything new to the table (other than the bugs), you don't encounter it in the first 20 minutes of gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback. I'm extremely sorry that you ran into these frustrating issues. We released our first patch on Wednesday, 06.10.21 which fixed a multitude of bugs. You can find the details here!

https://oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/232266182268546/

This is the first of many updates. In addition to fixes we will be regularly adding loads of new free content! We hope you’ll continue to play the game over the next weeks and months. We are confident that your experience will only get better!

Check out our frequently-updated roadmap for more details: 
https://trello.com/b/kfrxIbeN/sweet-surrender-public-roadmap#

Thanks for your support.

reviews.review_description: This is only getting a two star review rn because the game is really buggy to the point that I find it unplayable. You're character's arms could get stuck in the walls or you'll full through the floor to your death. There's also a weird glitch where your guns will jusr leave your holdsters and be floating in the mid air. I loved this game for the 30 min I was able to play it, but the bugs are too much for me.  Ive experience them everytime I fire up the game, so for now, wait till it all gets patched.

developer_response.body: We know it's been a long time but we're wondering if you've had a chance to try a more recent build. We've released 8 major updates in the past year, we think you might really enjoy the game in its latest state.

reviews.review_description:
I was hoping this game would be as good as Immortal Redneck. It's fun and I'm still moving up the skill trees to see what the different options are. I like the guns and the different power ups you can add to each arm.

The downside: you really need to play straight through until you die. They added the save function but when I do that, I lose one or both guns. Imagine starting in the higher levels and only having pistols. Also, items stored in my front area disappear. 

Not only that, pausing. I literally paused the game and lost a machine gun that was in my hand. Another time, the gun disappeared and in it's place, a grenade...and it was set to explode. I had to quickly throw it.

Also, after pausing, my front gunholsters disappeared. Annoying at first as you have to throw your guns on the floor to use items or grenades. Impossible later as you need to use ziplines in later levels so you'll have to leave a weapon behind, making dualwielding no more until you find another weapon.

I hope this issues get fixed. The game is good and definitely worth the cost.

developer_response.body:
First off, thank you for taking the time to let us know about your issues.
We've had a few reports that using the save and quit function as well as the oculus pause menu causes issues with your inventory and are currently working on it. We plan to release a fix with a coming update.

reviews.review_description: The comfort controls are terrible, how can you release something so buggy? Refund requested.

developer_response.body: It's unfortunate to hear that the comfort controls are terrible for you. Have you tried out the different options in the settings? If you did and it didn't help you, we would appreciate to hear from you what's missing in your opinion or what could be made better. We would also like to hear what bugs you encountered in relation to that.

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game. Yes the graphics look plain but it works so well. The lines are crisp and the attention to detail on weapons and robots is awesome. You can see the bolt slide back while you shoot the assault rifle and when it's empty you can see inside the chamber. A lot of the weapons have a light on the magazine that depletes the more you shoot, the grenade launcher mag spins and the pistol slides move. I've played more expensive games where these details have been skipped. Its these little details mixed into great gameplay that I love. The core gameplay is super fun if you like roguelikes/roguelikes. The diversity in weapons and modifiers are great and I can't wait to see more added. There are secret areas to find, classes to unlock and daily runs. The only complaints/changes I have are...

1. Some times a gun gets stuck in a table or enemy but grabbing it a couple times has fixed it. 
2. I think the sniper rifle should have a 2x magnifier. Kind of defeats the purpose of a sniper if it doesn't zoom a bit.
3. Coming from the gun community myself, the game uses the word "clip" instead of "magazine" or "mag". Not a huge deal just bugs me personally 🤣 
4. Obviously more weapons and modifiers add to the replayability so more more more! Can't wait for the acid update!

Overall I absolutely love it! Keep up the great work and I can't wait to see what new updates bring!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review. We really appreciate it. It is nice to hear that you enjoy playing the game. Your complaints and suggestions are interesting to read. They are noted and we will discuss them internally.

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing it is very fun to play but there is a glitch that when you spawn you instantly die by falling out of the map￼ please fix it￼

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: We just recently released a hotfix that adresses this issue. This bug shouldn't occur anymore.

We're sorry to hear that this issue occurs to you. We are currently working on this issue and try to resolve it. If you have any detailed information that could help us to find out what this issue exactly causes. Despite that we still really appreciate the good rating you gave us.

https://discord.gg/salmigames

reviews.review_description:
Very fun game to play. Its different every time you go through it. 
  I've started over a lot. Because the game doesn't save. How do you save the game?

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. We really appreciate it. We are currently working on a save & quit feature so that you can pause the game and continue later where you left the game. Our plan is to release this feature in the next update.

reviews.review_description: I love rogue lites, but this one has so little progression between each runs it's not any fun for me
I feel this is one of the original VR shooter game what was released because the gameplay just bores me nothing really excites me except the trailer what made me buy it!

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that, can you share a bit what you disliked and how the gameplay didn't match what you expected from seeing the trailer?

reviews.review_title: Great game but not really rouge like
reviews.review_description:
It's a great game if you want a shooter this is probably the best one. However if you want a rougelike it's not your traditional rougelike. You get 4 items(chips) total and the majority of them are just basic stat boosts and you can't get the really fun ones like explosive bullets or trickshot(bouncy split bullets) till floor 5+, But by the time you find one your build is usually already set in stone and changing it can pretty easily kill you depending on what rooms you get. Still is a great game though.

What its missing to be a true rougelike

I Just wish they'd add a mode that allows you to just stack as many chips as you want will it be balanced no just double the enemies and call it a day your build will carry you from there. The best feeling in a rougelike is picking up every single upgrade you come across  getting an op build and just shredding everything.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and suggestion! We've had similar requests for more chip slots already, so we will be discussing this with the team!

reviews.review_description:
This game is great. Reloading is easy and arcade style by flicking the wrist(which I think matches with the fast paced action). There is a wide variety of guns and upgrade chips, and grenades to boot. Enemies are numerous and ai is adaptive. A lot of fun- definitely one to buy!
If any cons sometimes it can be a bit repetitive, but this is nicely balanced by random level generation

If anything to add, I think legendary(orange) weapons and chips would make a great addition, and more worlds. Also more time from the tracker would be nice, sometimes I feel like he comes too quickly in the larger levels- it would also be really rewarding to be able to kill him when he spawns, but it be unlikely because he has a large health pool for example. A separate skill tree would also be cool aside from chips, but that could also be a lot to balance.
It is jest gud
